mano_cua.result_summary: 外部API依赖不可用。open5e前端依赖api.open5e.com的v2 API获取所有内容数据，但该API当前返回HTML而非JSON。commit a85fe09abf同样使用v2 API。/classes/warlock/ancient-dragons页面无法加载数据。无法测试子职业特性排序功能。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Same v2 API dependency as all other open5e cases. composables/api.ts confirmed using v2/ endpoints on commit a85fe09abf. External API at api.open5e.com/v2/ is returning HTML instead of JSON.
